commands.command: Read-only propagation audit of T017 diff and tests

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: questionIdsはAPI、workflow、preview/start token、prompt、manifest、resumeへ安全に伝播し、listGroup escapeとquestionRange競合を拒否する。ただしrecent-run public summaryのfield allowlistにquestionIdsがなく、一覧readbackではexact scopeが消えるためsmoke前に補う。
evidence: qualification workflow validates exact IDs only after selected listGroup filtering.
preview and start include question_ids in token-bound plan generation.
run manifest and resume comparison preserve normalized questionIds.
goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: 汎用scope自体は妥当だが、public recent receiptへquestionIdsを残す小修正が必要。Judge応答待ちを打ち切り、PMが同じread-only証拠から判定した。
remaining_blockers: Add questionIds to recent-run public summary and regression test it.
